title: Designing a Conversational Dialogue System
scenario: Create a conversational dialogue system that can engage in free-flowing conversations with users. The system should be able to recognize context and respond accordingly. The input should be a user's input, and the output should be a response that continues the conversation.
constraints: Must include a context-aware conversation model
Must include a code snippet for the conversation model

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the response includes a context-aware conversation model
Check if the response continues the conversation in a coherent and logical manner
Check if the response adheres to best practices for code quality and organization
Check if the response adheres to the constraints on length
